zh.Of,St. Ninians,Strlng,Scot: 英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾聖 尼尼安斯
zh.lifeSummary: John Gilchrist是Gawin MacGilchrist和Alice of Gargunnock的兒子，出生在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾加根諾可。他於1575年與Janet Thomsone在蘇格蘭斯林史爾聖 尼尼安斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1607年8月20日在蘇格蘭斯林史爾加根諾可。

nameMeanings.name: Gilchrist
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (western) and Irish (Down): from Gaelic Mac Giolla Chríosd, Mac Gille Chríosd ‘son of the servant of Christ’.

variants.name: Kilcrease
meanings: History: Robert Kilcrease (c. 1750–1808) came from Scotland(probably Kilmarnock) to Edgefield, SC, c. 1770.

variants.name: Gilchrest
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Gilchrist  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Gilkerson
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Chrìosd ‘son of Gille Chrìosd' (see Gilchrist ).

variants.name: Gilkey
meanings: Irish (northern): possibly a pet form of the Scottishpersonal name   Gilchrist  .

variants.name: Gilcrest
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Gilchrist  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Gilcrease
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Gilchrist  .

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: John Gilchrist was born in Gargunnock, Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom as the son of Gawin MacGilchrist and Alice of Gargunnock. He married Janet Thomsone in 1575, in St Ninians, Stirlingshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 20 August 1607, in Gargunnock, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: John Gilchrist est né à Gargunnock, Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, fils de Gawin MacGilchrist et Alice of Gargunnock. Il a épousé Janet Thomsone en 1575, à St Ninians, Stirlingshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 20 août 1607, à Gargunnock, Stirlingshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: John Gilchrist wurde in Gargunnock, Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Gawin MacGilchrist und Alice of Gargunnock geboren. Er hat 1575 in St Ninians, Stirlingshire, Scotland Janet Thomsone geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 20. August 1607 in Gargunnock, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

Lui sposato Janet Thomsone nel 1575, nel St Ninians, Stirlingshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 20 agosto 1607, nel Gargunnock, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

ja.Of,St. Ninians,Strlng,Scot: イギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアスト ニニアンス
ja.lifeSummary: John GilchristはイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアガーグノックでGawin MacGilchristとAlice of Gargunnockの息子として生まれた。1575年にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアスト ニニアンスでJanet Thomsoneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1607年8月20日にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアガーグノックで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Gilchrist(은)는 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르 가건옥크에서 Gawin MacGilchrist(와)과 Alice of Gargunnock의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1575년 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 스트 니니누스에서 Janet Thomsone(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1607년 8월 20일 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 가건옥크에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Gilchrist nasceu em Gargunnock, Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom filho de Gawin MacGilchrist e Alice of Gargunnock. Ele casou-se com Janet Thomsone em 1575, em St Ninians, Stirlingshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de agosto de 1607, em Gargunnock, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: John Gilchrist родился в местности гаргуннокк, стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Gawin MacGilchrist и Alice of Gargunnock. Он женился на женщине по имени Janet Thomsone в 1575 г. в местности ст нинянс, стирлингшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 20 августа 1607 г. в местности гаргуннокк, стирлингшир, Шотландия.
